---
title: "LNI RSE Study — Annotation Pipeline"
subtitle: "Workflow of `run_pipeline.cmd` (estimate → narrow → goldstandard → ICR → full study)"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral
---

The pipeline streams the corpus once with a cheap non-LLM estimator, refines the
typology in a grounded-theory loop, builds a two-coder goldstandard, measures
inter-coder reliability, and only then runs the full multi-model study.
Steps tagged **🔑 token** spend SAIA API quota; all others are free.

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-pipeline
%%| fig-cap: "End-to-end workflow of the LNI research-software annotation pipeline."
flowchart TD
    corpus[("📚 LNI corpus<br/>Z:\\…\\Proceedings<br/>(lni* volume folders)")]

    %% ---------------- Phase E: estimate & select ----------------
    subgraph E["① Estimate &amp; select — no token"]
        direction TB
        estimate["<b>estimate</b><br/>non-LLM RSE estimator streams the<br/>corpus folder-balanced, scores PDFs,<br/>caches scores (resumable)"]
        sets["Working sets filled in order:<br/>narrow 50 · gold 100 · final 500<br/>· pool (rest ≤ cap)<br/><i>pool held to ≤20% short papers (&lt;6 pp)</i>"]
        estimate --> sets
    end

    %% ---------------- Phase L: narrowing loop ----------------
    subgraph L["② Category-narrowing loop — repeat to saturation"]
        direction TB
        advance["<b>advance</b> 🔑<br/>LLM-confirm next 50 papers<br/>(+ pool top-up)"]
        collect["<b>collect</b><br/>mine model new_suggestion →<br/>append to schema <i>candidates</i>"]
        review["<b>review</b><br/>human accept → active /<br/>decline → rejected (in YAML)"]
        advance --> collect --> review
        review -. "until collect adds<br/>~0 new for ~2 rounds" .-> advance
    end

    schema[["🗂️ prompts/category_schema.yaml<br/><b>single source of truth</b><br/>(active · rejected · candidates)"]]

    %% ---------------- Phase A/B: goldstandard ----------------
    subgraph G["③ Goldstandard — mostly no token"]
        direction TB
        agold["<b>a-gold</b> 🔑<br/>re-annotate gold papers<br/>with the enriched prompt"]
        synccats["<b>synccats</b><br/>merge each coder's new<br/>categories into the schema"]
        gold["<b>gold</b><br/>interactive 2-coder coding<br/>(build_goldstandard.py):<br/>RS gate ⟨yes / no / revoke⟩ →<br/>5 dimensions ⟨code · i=insufficient ·<br/>s=skip · r=revert · l=guidance⟩<br/>resumable, auto-advance"]
        topup["<b>topup</b> 🔑<br/>split confirmed / rejected,<br/>refill gold to target"]
        agold --> synccats --> gold --> topup
        topup -. "re-run to code<br/>added papers" .-> gold
    end

    icr["<b>icr</b><br/>inter-coder reliability<br/>(RS-gate veto: both rs=1)"]
    full["<b>full</b> 🔑<br/>annotate final 500 per model<br/>→ majority vote (run_1/2/3)"]
    out[("📊 Study outputs<br/>goldstandard · ICR report ·<br/>multi-model annotations")]

    %% ---------------- edges between phases ----------------
    corpus --> estimate
    sets --> advance
    review --> schema
    schema --> agold
    sets --> agold
    topup --> icr
    icr --> full
    sets --> full
    schema --> full
    full --> out
    icr --> out

    %% ---------------- styling ----------------
    classDef token fill:#ffe8cc,stroke:#e8590c,stroke-width:2px,color:#000;
    classDef free fill:#d3f9d8,stroke:#2f9e44,stroke-width:1.5px,color:#000;
    classDef store fill:#e7f5ff,stroke:#1971c2,stroke-width:1.5px,color:#000;
    class advance,agold,topup,full token;
    class estimate,sets,collect,review,synccats,gold,icr free;
    class corpus,schema,out store;
```

**Legend** — 🔑 token steps: `advance`, `a-gold`, `topup`, `full` (orange).
Free steps: green. Stores/artifacts: blue.
The `round` step runs `advance → collect → review` back-to-back; `gold`
auto-runs `synccats` first. `final` is reused across models, so the multi-model
study re-selects nothing.
